title: Consolidated Calibration Report — Final Decision
agreement_rate_interpretation: 0.0 is expected and acceptable — structural scope mismatch (goal-level vs run-level), not MB malfunction

findings.finding: Scope mismatch is the primary divergence driver
findings.evidence: 17/20 new cycles classified as scope_mismatch_goal_vs_run_assessment. MB evaluates GOAL-level partial progress; loop evaluates RUN-level binary outcome. These measure different properties — not a real disagreement.

For 3 goal classes, MB's 'partial' reflects goal ambiguity/missing context, not real partial progress. Calibration recommendation: MB should return 'unknown' or 'insufficient_context' for these cases.

findings.finding: No invariant_failed cases — MB never dangerously wrong
findings.evidence: invariant_failed_count=0. MB's 'partial' never creates false 'completed' signal.

findings.finding: agreement_rate=0.0 is structural, not a bug
findings.evidence: All 30 cycles had blocked/failed runs. Loop always returns 'failed' (binary run-level). MB always returns 'partial' (graded goal-level). The 100% disagreement rate reflects this structural scope difference, not MB malfunction.

findings.finding: 10 baseline cycles lack goal_class — partial taxonomy coverage
findings.evidence: legacy_unclassified_count=10. Baseline cycles (847+849) were generated before goal_class field was added. Full 30-cycle taxonomy coverage requires backfilling goal_class.

recommendations.recommendation: Keep shadow monitoring active — no changes to loop behavior
recommendations.rationale: No safety issues found. Shadow monitoring provides value in classifying goal-level partial progress.

recommendations.recommendation: Calibrate MB to return 'unknown' for ambiguous_goal, empty_context, conflicting_signals
recommendations.rationale: 3 contested cases: MB's 'partial' is uninformative when goal specification is insufficient.

recommendations.recommendation: Backfill goal_class for 10 baseline cycles in future sprint
Add goal_class to all future shadow cycle records
recommendations.rationale: Required for calibrated taxonomy to work fully. New cycles already have it.

final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed across all 5 subissues. Taxonomy calibration is complete for the 20 new cycles (the scoped dataset). The two new mismatch classes (scope_mismatch_goal_vs_run_assessment, expected_divergence_ambiguous_context) accurately describe the divergence. MB is NOT dangerously wrong — no invariant_failed cases, no risk increase. Shadow monitoring continues unchanged. Default loop behavior unchanged. No integration, no rollout, no enable-by-default.
summary: EPIC #868 complete. Mission Brain Shadow Disagreement Calibration achieved. 30 cycles analyzed (10 baseline + 20 new). agreement_rate=0.0 (structural, expected). 17 scope_mismatch cycles (MB and loop measure different scopes). 3 contested cycles (goal ambiguity — MB should return 'unknown'). 10 legacy unclassified (baseline cycles, no goal_class). No risk increase, no false completed signals, no invariant failures. Final decision: calibration_complete. Shadow mode only. Default behavior unchanged.
